$workspaceId..read: auth != null && root.child('access').child(auth.uid).exists() && data.exists() && data.child('deleted').val() !== true && (data.child('visibility').val() !== 'private' || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid)
$workspaceId..write: auth != null && root.child('access').child(auth.uid).exists() && newData.exists() && newData.child('id').val() === $workspaceId && (newData.child('visibility').val() === 'shared' || newData.child('visibility').val() === 'private') && (!newData.child('deleted').exists() || newData.child('deleted').isBoolean()) && ((newData.child('visibility').val() === 'shared' && (!data.exists() || data.child('visibility').val() !== 'private' || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid)) || (newData.child('visibility').val() === 'private' && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid && (!data.exists() || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid)))
$workspaceId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id', 'name', 'visibility', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('id').isString() && newData.child('name').isString() && (newData.child('visibility').val() === 'shared' || newData.child('visibility').val() === 'private') && newData.child('updatedAt').isString() && (!newData.child('ownerUid').exists() || newData.child('ownerUid').isString()) && (!newData.child('ownerEmail').exists() || newData.child('ownerEmail').isString()) && (!newData.child('deleted').exists() || newData.child('deleted').isBoolean())

$sessionId..write: auth != null && root.child('access').child(auth.uid).exists() && (!root.child('workspaceCatalog').child($workspaceId).exists() || (root.child('workspaceCatalog').child($workspaceId).child('deleted').val() !== true && (root.child('workspaceCatalog').child($workspaceId).child('visibility').val() !== 'private' || root.child('workspaceCatalog').child($workspaceId).child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid))) && (!newData.exists() || newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid)

$taskId..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['id', 'title', 'status', 'createdAt', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('id').isString() && newData.child('title').isString() && newData.child('title').val().length <= 500 && (newData.child('status').val() === 'todo' || newData.child('status').val() === 'in_progress' || newData.child('status').val() === 'waiting' || newData.child('status').val() === 'done') && (!newData.child('priority').exists() || newData.child('priority').val() === 'high' || newData.child('priority').val() === 'medium' || newData.child('priority').val() === 'low') && (!newData.child('dueDate').exists() || (newData.child('dueDate').isString() && newData.child('dueDate').val().length <= 10)) && (!newData.child('notes').exists() || (newData.child('notes').isString() && newData.child('notes').val().length <= 5000)))
